The '''LAATAK''', or '''Long Range Air Attack Mechanism''', was a model of [[air cruiser]] employed by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]].

==Characteristics==
Designed for both space travel and low altitude atmospheric flight, the LAATAK could drop massive loads of ordnance on ground targets.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
